name: Data Stack Patterns
title: Modern Data Stack Patterns
description: Core patterns for ELT, data modeling with dbt, and pipeline orchestration using Python-based tools like Airflow or Dagster.

axiomAlignment.A1_verifiability: Patterns ensure data lineage and quality which are directly verifiable via tests.
axiomAlignment.A2_user_primacy: Maintains data trust for end-users and stakeholders.
axiomAlignment.A3_transparency: Lineage documentation makes data transformations explicit.
axiomAlignment.A4_non_harm: Ensures data privacy and prevents catastrophic data loss during migrations.
axiomAlignment.A5_consistency: Standardizes transformation logic and naming conventions across the data warehouse.

ELT-Layering.description: Structuring data warehouse transformations into staging, intermediate, and mart layers.
ELT-Layering.use_when: Managing scalable data transformations in modern warehouses like Snowflake or BigQuery.
best_practices: No joins in the staging layer.
Apply renaming and casting as close to the source as possible.

Data-Contract-Validation.description: Enforcing schema and quality constraints at the ingestion boundary.
Data-Contract-Validation.use_when: Preventing upstream breaking changes from corrupting production data pipelines.
Data-Contract-Validation.code_example:
version: 2
models:
  - name: orders
    tests:
      - unique
      - not_null
      - accepted_values: {values: ['shipped', 'completed']}
best_practices: Include uniqueness and nullity tests for all primary keys.
Use accepted_values for categorical status fields.
Run tests before every deployment to production.
Commit dbt documentation to a shared repository for visibility.
Use environment variables for all database credentials.
Implement incremental loading for large datasets to save costs.
Maintain a clear separation between raw, clean, and modeled data.

anti_patterns.name: One-Big-Table (OBT) in Staging
anti_patterns.problem: Combining multiple sources into one table early makes lineage tracing and error debugging difficult.
anti_patterns.fix: Use one staging model per raw source and join only in the mart layer.
